title: The Country's Hatred Is Exposed
description: Pages 16–17 focus on the country's hatred is exposed, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as dressrosa's past and the suffering of the Riku family deepen the stakes behind Rebecca, the toys, and Doflamingo's rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's what I was thinking, too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Uohhh, just as expected ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: USSO- LAND!! E

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: USSO- LAND!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Ohhhh!! That Riku King sure was a great guy, being so kind to a bunch of little bug people.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Who are you calling bugs!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I mean it in a good way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh, well thanks, then!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But Captain-San, just now, that female Gladia- for in the Col- Ossem...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: was being booed and called "The Granddaugh- Ter of King Riku".

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: It seems as though the people of this country despise King Riku...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ohhh, USSO- LAND!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Ten years ago... King Riku lost the trust of the people...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: In an incident that occurred one awful night.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But the citizens don't know the truth behind it....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: to the bitter end, the king tried to protect the country.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: At that time, Doflamingo attempted to eradicate the Riku clan...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: But I took under my wing Rebecca, who shares the Royal Blood of King Riku.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We ran and ran, for years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But in the end, we were caught.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Sol- Pier-san is always brave~

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: And now... she endures the public's scorn in the Colosseum!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: If it means protecting King Riku's Honor and Rebecca's Life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I don't care when or where I die!! I'm staking it all on this fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Just who are you...

dialogue.speaker: Toy Soldier
dialogue.text: I couldn't protect Rebecca's mother.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: There is not a single moment when I forget that day!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: That child may not remember me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Given my transforma- lion into a toy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: But I am...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Rebecca's father.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: She bears that blood!! That destiny!!

summary: The Country's Hatred Is Exposed focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #5 as dressrosa's past and the suffering of the Riku family deepen the stakes behind Rebecca, the toys, and Doflamingo's rule.
